title: achyrospermum peulhorum
intro: Achyrospermum peulhorum, also known as Peulhorum, is a plant species that belongs to the Verbenaceae family, commonly found in the tropical regions of Central and West Africa. The medicinal properties of Achyrospermum peulhorum include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which make it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain and inflammation, and treat respiratory problems such as bronchitis and coughs. Achyrospermum peulhorum can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall health and well-being.
